---
title: "Quantification of signal display complexity in birds"
image: "../images/card_pics/manakin_dancing.jpg"
description: "We apply information theory to measure and assess the function of the complexity of the social displays in tropical birds."
categories: ["Animal Communication & Contest Dynamics"]
contributors: "BCL"
feature_order: "NA"
format:
  html:
    toc: FALSE
---
